test.create_query: CREATE TABLE perf_part_agg_cache (k UInt32, v UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 1000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 2000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 3000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 4000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 5000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 6000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 7000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 8000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 9000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
SELECT k, sum(v), avg(v), count() FROM perf_part_agg_cache GROUP BY k FORMAT Null
test.query: SELECT k, sum(v), avg(v), count() FROM perf_part_agg_cache GROUP BY k FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_reads_from_part_aggregation_cache = 0, enable_writes_to_part_aggregation_cache = 0
SELECT k, sum(v), avg(v), count() FROM perf_part_agg_cache GROUP BY k FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_reads_from_part_aggregation_cache = 1, enable_writes_to_part_aggregation_cache = 0
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO perf_part_agg_cache SELECT number % 1000, number + 10000000 FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: SELECT k, sum(v), avg(v), count() FROM perf_part_agg_cache GROUP BY k FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_reads_from_part_aggregation_cache = 0, enable_writes_to_part_aggregation_cache = 0
SELECT k, sum(v), avg(v), count() FROM perf_part_agg_cache GROUP BY k FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_reads_from_part_aggregation_cache = 1, enable_writes_to_part_aggregation_cache = 1
